name: nckhsv-root
description: Thư mục gốc quản lý dự án NCKHSV Đa Cổng

scripts.superadmin: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'title SUPERADMIN BACKEND; cd SUPERADMIN\backend; node server.js'; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'title SUPERADMIN FRONTEND; cd SUPERADMIN\frontend; $env:PORT=5174; npm start'"
scripts.admin: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'title ADMIN BACKEND; cd ADMIN\backend; node server.js'; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'title ADMIN FRONTEND; cd ADMIN\frontend; $env:PORT=5175; npm start'"
scripts.user: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'title USER FRONTEND; cd USER; npm run dev'"
